issues.title: Missed explicit English switch
issues.evidence: The customer asked for English, but the next assistant reply still contained mixed-language phrasing.
issues.suggested_fix: Make the very next reply 100% English when the customer explicitly requests English.

issues.title: Asked for account number
issues.evidence: The agent asked the customer to confirm the account number even though the account is already preloaded.
issues.suggested_fix: Do not ask for the account number. Use the preloaded account context directly.
